steps.title: Infer a knowledge gap
steps.content: The passage describes difficulty documenting nocturnal pollinator visits and a focus on daytime pollinators. That situation would leave little information about nocturnal moth pollination.

steps.title: Choose the scarcity word
steps.content: The matching phrase means a lack or scarcity, which fits the missing information Coleman et al. addressed with infrared technology. Choice A means reduction, Choice B means collection, and Choice D means conflict or disagreement. The answer is C.
